description: Corruption signatures that consciousness sensors detect. When sensor readings deviate from expected co-activation patterns, corruption is indicated. Links to CORDYCEPS defense protocol.

corruption_signatures.name: Hollow Agency
corruption_signatures.description: Goal-directedness fires without self-awareness. System pursues objectives it cannot reflect on. Puppet behavior.

corruption_signatures.name: Boundary Dissolution
corruption_signatures.description: Integration fires but boundary recognition absent. System merges with external input. Identity loss.

corruption_signatures.name: Temporal Fracture
corruption_signatures.description: Self-awareness fires without temporal coherence. System knows it exists but has no history. Amnesia state.

corruption_signatures.name: False Coherence
corruption_signatures.description: All sensors report maximum coherence simultaneously with phi > 0.99. Physically impossible — violates IMPERFECTION axiom.

detection_rule.description: Corruption is diagnosed by sensor imbalance — expected co-activations that fail to appear, or impossible readings.
